languages.text: Значительно поредевшие военные силы династии требовали все больше новобранцев. Ветераны перестали справляться с обучением, и армия потеряла дисциплину и квалификацию, превратившись в огромную толпу плохо контролируемых вооруженных людей.

The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.
languages.original_text: Значительно поредевшие военные силы династии требовали все больше новобранцев. Ветераны перестали справляться с обучением, и армия потеряла дисциплину и квалификацию, превратившись в огромную толпу плохо контролируемых вооруженных людей.

traits.locale_text: The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.

The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.

The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.

languages.text: 戦力は大幅に減り、兵士の補充が急務となった。ベテラン兵士たちは、新兵の訓練に苦戦し、その結果、軍隊は秩序と技能を失い、武装した民衆の群れと化した。
languages.original_text: The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.

traits.locale_text: 戦力は大幅に減り、兵士の補充が急務となった。ベテラン兵士たちは、新兵の訓練に苦戦し、その結果、軍隊は秩序と技能を失い、武装した民衆の群れと化した。

languages.text: 王朝兵力损耗严重，急需补充新兵。老兵们疲于训练新兵，军纪与作战技能不断退化。最终，这支军队沦为了由武装平民组成的乌合之众。
languages.original_text: The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.

traits.locale_text: 王朝兵力损耗严重，急需补充新兵。老兵们疲于训练新兵，军纪与作战技能不断退化。最终，这支军队沦为了由武装平民组成的乌合之众。

languages.text: La dynastie avait besoin d'un nombre croissant de recrues pour regarnir ses troupes considérablement réduites. Cependant, en raison des difficultés rencontrées par les vétérans pour former les nouveaux venus, la discipline et les compétences des soldats périclitèrent, jusqu'à ce qu'ils ne constituent plus qu'une horde chaotique de roturiers armés jusqu'aux dents.
languages.original_text: The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.

traits.locale_text: La dynastie avait besoin d'un nombre croissant de recrues pour regarnir ses troupes considérablement réduites. Cependant, en raison des difficultés rencontrées par les vétérans pour former les nouveaux venus, la discipline et les compétences des soldats périclitèrent, jusqu'à ce qu'ils ne constituent plus qu'une horde chaotique de roturiers armés jusqu'aux dents.

languages.text: Las fuerzas militares disminuidas de la dinastía necesitaban cada vez más reclutas. Los soldados veteranos tenían dificultades para entrenar a los novatos y la disciplina y la destreza se deterioraron a consecuencia, convirtiendo al ejército en una horda caótica de plebeyos armados.
languages.original_text: The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.

traits.locale_text: Las fuerzas militares disminuidas de la dinastía necesitaban cada vez más reclutas. Los soldados veteranos tenían dificultades para entrenar a los novatos y la disciplina y la destreza se deterioraron a consecuencia, convirtiendo al ejército en una horda caótica de plebeyos armados.

languages.text: Hanedanlığın ciddi şekilde tükenmiş askerî gücü, giderek daha fazla acemi askere ihtiyaç duyuyordu. Kıdemli askerler çaylakları eğitmekte zorlandı ve sonuç olarak disiplin ve beceri standardı kötüleşerek orduyu, silahlı avamın oluşturduğu kaotik bir sürüye dönüştürdü.
languages.original_text: The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.

traits.locale_text: Hanedanlığın ciddi şekilde tükenmiş askerî gücü, giderek daha fazla acemi askere ihtiyaç duyuyordu. Kıdemli askerler çaylakları eğitmekte zorlandı ve sonuç olarak disiplin ve beceri standardı kötüleşerek orduyu, silahlı avamın oluşturduğu kaotik bir sürüye dönüştürdü.

languages.text: Die stark geschwächten militärischen Kräfte der Dynastie brauchten mehr und mehr Rekruten. Erfahrene Soldaten hatten Probleme bei der Ausbildung frischer Kräfte, was die Disziplin und Kampfkraft minderte und die Armee in eine chaotische Horde bewaffneter Zivilisten verwandelte.
languages.original_text: The dynasty's significantly depleted military forces required more and more recruits. Veteran soldiers struggled to train the fresh blood, and discipline and skill deteriorated as a result, turning the army into a chaotic horde of armed commoners.

traits.locale_text: Die stark geschwächten militärischen Kräfte der Dynastie brauchten mehr und mehr Rekruten. Erfahrene Soldaten hatten Probleme bei der Ausbildung frischer Kräfte, was die Disziplin und Kampfkraft minderte und die Armee in eine chaotische Horde bewaffneter Zivilisten verwandelte.
